answer:
<think> The Revolution was a stable in TNA (Total Nonstop Action Wrestling). To identify the member born on June 29, 1986, I need to recall the names of the wrestlers who were part of the Revolution and their birth dates. </think>

<answer> Robbie E </answer>

Explanation: Robbie E, whose real name is Robert Straight, was born on June 29, 1986, and was a member of the Revolution stable in TNA.
